creator: az@FreeBSD.org
text:
No problem, expect it already exist in ports tree but have name
www/p5-FastCGI
That I was told you about in previous follow up.

On Fri, Feb 18, 2011 at 12:25 PM, Veniamin Gvozdikov <
g.veniamin@googlemail.com> wrote:

> Hello.
> What's a problem commit it? I'm using it now with nginx.
>
> On Feb 18, 2011, at 4:22 PM, Andrej Zverev wrote:
>
> Hello.
>
> Actually every year someone send such PR and someone brings it into tree.
> You really want www/p5-FastCGI
